data.title: SAB BIO Presents Additional Clinical and Mechanistic Data from SAB-142 Phase 1 Trial in Adult Patients with Established Autoimmune Type 1 Diabetes at IDS 2026
data.description: Four participants with Type 1 Diabetes (T1D) who were treated with SAB-142 demonstrated preserved levels of C-peptide. Among them, three participants exhibited a super responder profile, along with T cell exhaustion.

data.title: Advantage Solutions Announces Date for its First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: Advantage Solutions Inc., listed on NASDAQ GS as ADV, is set to unveil its first-quarter financial figures on May 6, 2026, at 7 a.m. EDT. A conference call will follow at 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day for interested stakeholders to delve into the details.

data.title: Rogers Communications Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Rogers has shown ongoing growth in total service revenue and adjusted EBITDA compared to the previous year. The company has also demonstrated substantial increase in free cash flow. Furthermore, they have raised their forecasts for capital expenditures and free cash flow.

data.title: Stifel Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: St. Louis-based Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE: SF) announced its financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, posting net revenues of $1.48 billion. This marks a significant increase from the $1.26 billion reported during the same period the previous year. Net income available to common shareholders saw a substantial rise to $242.1 million, equating to $1.48 per diluted common share, in stark contrast to the $43.7 million, or $0.26 per diluted common share, reported in the first quarter of 2025. Furthermore, the company reported a non-GAAP net income available to common shareholders of $237.5 million, translating to $1.45 per diluted common share for the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: NetraMark Positioned to Advance Psychedelic Clinical Trials Following U.S. Executive Order, Supported by Peer-Reviewed Research and Active Programs
data.description: On April 22, 2026, NetraMark Holdings Inc. (TSX: AIAI) (OTCQB: AINMF) (Frankfurt: PF0) highlighted its unique position as an artificial intelligence (AI) company revolutionizing clinical trials in the pharmaceutical sector. The company showcased its ability to aid psychedelic clinical trials in a way that sets it apart from traditional methods, potentially propelling the progress of psychedelic therapies. This comes in light of a recent executive order in the U.S. aimed at hastening innovation in this sector.

data.title: From Lab to Field: HPQ and Novacium Secure First Battery Order from European Drone Manufacturer Using GEN4 Cells
data.description: HPQ and Novacium have successfully secured their initial order for drone batteries powered by GEN4 cells. This achievement represents a significant milestone in the advancement of high-capacity lithium-ion packs for drones. The collaboration between the two companies has led to this pivotal moment in the commercialization of these advanced battery technologies. This first order signifies a promising start in the market for these high-capacity batteries, with a potential to set a new standard in the drone industry. This development opens up opportunities for HPQ and Novacium to establish themselves as key players in supplying cutting-edge drone battery solutions globally.
Old National Bancorp reveals Q1 2026 results, showcasing strong financial performance and exceeding revenue targets.

data.title: Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Dunmore, Pennsylvania, on April 22, 2026, Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: FDBC) and its banking arm, The Fidelity Deposit and Discount Bank, shared unaudited, consolidated financial data for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Jacobs joint venture to design five new stations for Sydney Metro West project
data.description: Dallas-based company Jacobs, along with GHD and WSP, have been selected to collaborate on the design of five new underground stations for Sydney Metro West – Stations Package West in Australia. The joint venture will focus on designing these stations to support the expansion of the metro system in Sydney.

data.title: Teledyne Technologies Reports First Quarter Results
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) in Thousand Oaks, Calif. reported record-breaking first quarter results. Their net sales for the quarter totaled $1,560.1 million, marking a 7.6% increase from the previous year. The company's GAAP diluted earnings per share for the quarter were $4.85, while their non-GAAP diluted earnings per share reached $5.80, showing a significant 17.2% increase from last year. Teledyne also reported $234.0 million in cash from operations and $204 million in free cash flow for the first quarter, reflecting strong financial performance.

data.title: PENGU sees big gains with Bitcoin at $78K, $418M liquidated. Altcoins rally; market outlook improves, experts cautious.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market has seen a positive shift as alternative coins surged while Bitcoin approached a retest of $78,000. Despite this, experts are still exercising caution.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility Co-Founders, Officers, and Directors Backing 2026 Plan with Common Stock Purchases
data.description: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. disclosed that key officers and directors, such as a Co-Founder, Chairman of the Board, CEO, and CFO, have collectively purchased $5.3 million worth of SRFM common stock. The transactions were reported in Form 4 filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission. This move comes as part of the company's air mobility platform's ongoing activities.

data.title: OneSpaWorld Announces First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited, a leading global provider of health and wellness offerings on cruise ships and at destination resorts, is set to unveil its First Quarter Fiscal 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 29th before the market opens. The company, listed on NASDAQ as OSW, will host a conference call at 10:00 am Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the quarterly performance. This release will provide investors and stakeholders with key insights into the company's financial standing and operational activities.
